final:
module top_module(
    input [31:0] in,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [31:0] out);always@(posedge clk or posedge rst)
begin
    if(rst)
        out <= 32'h00003000; 
    else if(en)
        out <= in;
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
